question.label: Pacing tradeoff
question.name: What have you had to drop or slow down to keep up with everything on your plate?
question.description: Surfaces hidden workload pressure and the trade-offs they are making to stay afloat.

answer: A bit disconnected. I don't really know the team outside of tickets, and I missed the last two socials.

assessment.note: They described feeling disconnected and missing the last two socials, which points to lower wellbeing and engagement; the answer did not add clarity or growth signal.

history.answer_excerpt: Honestly kind of drained. I haven't been sleeping well and I'm behind on things.
